## Summary
- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Risk & Rollback
- Risk level: low / medium / high
- Rollback plan (exact commands):

## Migration Impact
- [ ] No migration
- [ ] Forward-only migration added
- [ ] Data backfill required
- [ ] Contract change documented

## Verification
- [ ] `make verify` passed locally
- [ ] Smoke scenario validated
- [ ] Added/updated tests

## Notes
- Correlation IDs and error envelope considered
- Idempotency/rate limits considered for write routes
